auth.mustChangePassword: Please change your password. Your current password was sent via email and should be replaced.
auth.forgotDesc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.addFirstHint: Click + New to add your first contact

posts.title: Posts
posts.deletePostConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post?

visibility.title: Visibility
visibility.sharedHint: Visible to family and portal guests
visibility.familyHint: Visible to family only, not portal guests

sensitive.title: Sensitive content
sensitive.desc: Hide posts and contacts marked as sensitive (e.g. health notes). You can turn this on at home and off at work or when guests are around. The mode is stored per device.
sensitive.show: Show sensitive content on this device
sensitive.activeForever: Active until you turn it off
sensitive.markPostHint: Mark this post as sensitive — it will be hidden unless sensitive mode is on
sensitive.markContactHint: Mark this contact as sensitive — the contact and all of its posts will be hidden unless sensitive mode is on

relationships.title: Relationships
relationships.createAndLinkDesc: Create a new contact and add as a relationship.
relationships.suggestionsDesc: Based on existing relationships, these connections may be missing. Accept to create them.
relationships.noSuggestions: No suggestions — all relationships look complete!

reason.siblings: Children of the same parent are siblings
reason.partnerChildren: Partner's children may also be your children

addresses.title: Addresses
addresses.label: Label (Home, Work...)
addresses.removeConfirm: Remove this address completely? History will be lost.
addresses.moveOutConfirm: Mark as moved out? The address will be kept as history.
addresses.mergeAllConfirm: Merge all {count} duplicate groups? This keeps the best address and moves all contacts.
addresses.noAddressToShare: This contact has no addresses to share.

labels.title: Labels
labels.selectLabel: Select a label to view contacts
labels.deleteConfirm: Delete label "{name}"? Contacts will not be deleted.

memories.title: Memories
memories.subtitle: Posts from {date} in previous years
memories.settingsCardDesc: Look back at posts from the same date in earlier years
memories.empty: No memories from today — come back another day!

sidebar.noBirthdays: No birthdays in the next 30 days

settings.title: Settings
settings.name: Name
settings.familyHouseholdDesc: Members, family portal, and security settings.
settings.systemAdminDesc: Manage all tenants in the system.
settings.securityCardDesc: Sessions, trusted networks, and access control.
settings.labelsCardDesc: Organize contacts with groups and labels.
settings.singleHousehold: You are a member of one household.
settings.sessionsDesc: Active login sessions on your account.
settings.revokeAllConfirm: This will log out all other devices. Continue?
settings.twoFactorDesc: Add an extra layer of security with an authenticator app.
settings.scanQrCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).
settings.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
settings.backupCodesDesc: Save these backup codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
settings.backupCodesSaved: I have saved my backup codes
settings.twoFactorRequired: Enter the code from your authenticator app.
settings.twoFactorSetupRequired: Two-factor authentication must be set up to log in from this location.
settings.passkeysDesc: Sign in with fingerprint, face recognition, or security key. Faster and more secure than passwords.
settings.passkeyNotSupported: Passkeys are not supported in this browser.

admin.allowRegistrationHint: When disabled, only system admin can create new tenants and users.
admin.allowPasswordResetHint: When enabled, users can reset their password from the login page via email.
admin.tenantsDesc: All households registered in the system.
admin.tenantAdminDesc: Create an administrator for this tenant.
admin.resetTenantPasswordDesc: Set a new password for all administrators in "{name}".
admin.deleteTenantWarning: This will permanently delete "{name}" and ALL its data: contacts, posts, photos, gifts. This cannot be undone.
admin.noActiveMembers: No members with login found in this tenant.
admin.registrationDisabled: Registration is disabled. Contact your administrator.
admin.switchConfirm: Switch to "{name}"? You will see their contacts and data.
admin.householdDesc: Manage who has access to your shared contact list.
admin.revokeAllConfirm: Revoke all other sessions? Users will need to log in again.
admin.memberListNote: Full member list requires a dedicated API endpoint (planned).
admin.emailConfigDesc: Configure SMTP to enable email reminders and notifications.
admin.emailConfigNote: When configured, users receive an email notification when a new login is detected on their account.
admin.loginNotifyDesc: Send an email to users when a new device or IP logs in.
admin.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate {name}? They will no longer be able to log in.
admin.sendPasswordEmailHint: Notifies the user with their new password.
admin.reset2faHint: Removes 2FA so the user can log in without a code. They can re-enable it themselves.
admin.passwordChangeNotice: User will be logged out and notified by email when password is changed.
admin.trustedIpDesc: Users on trusted networks can skip two-factor authentication. Use CIDR notation (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24) separated by commas.
admin.ipSecurityDesc: Restrict login access by IP address or country. Blocked IPs cannot attempt login at all.
admin.loginIpWhitelistHint: Only these IPs can attempt login. Leave empty to allow all. Use CIDR notation, separated by commas.
admin.geoDesc: Optionally restrict login by country using ipgeolocation.io (requires free API key).
admin.ipgeoApiKeyHint: Register at ipgeolocation.io for a free API key (1000 lookups/day).
admin.countryWhitelistHint: ISO country codes, comma-separated. Leave empty to allow all countries.
admin.geoKeyInvalid: API key test failed. Check that the key is correct.
admin.geoLocalInfo: You are on a local network — testing with a known external IP (8.8.8.8) to verify the API key works.
admin.ipLockoutWarning: Your current IP ({ip}) is NOT in the whitelist. You may lock yourself out! Continue?
admin.countryLockoutWarning: Your current country ({country} / {code}) is NOT in the allowed list. You may lock yourself out! Continue?
admin.loginEnabledHint: Turn off for household members who shouldn't have login access (e.g. children).
admin.sendWelcomeEmailHint: Sends login info to the user's email address.

companies.title: Companies
companies.name: Company name
companies.deleteConfirm: Delete {name}? All employee links will be removed.

groups.title: Groups
groups.importConfirm: Convert label "{name}" to a group? This will create a group and add {count} contacts as members.

notifications.settingsCardDesc: Choose which notifications you want and who they apply to
notifications.settingsIntro: Notifications apply to you only. Other users in the household have their own settings.
notifications.overrideHint: Override the general rules for individual contacts. E.g. never notify about X, or always notify about Y.
notifications.overridesPerType: Pick one override per type. Blank rows follow the general rule.
notifications.pushUnsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser
notifications.pushBlockedHint: You previously denied notifications. Open the browser settings for this site and allow notifications to enable.
notifications.pushEnabledHint: You'll get instant notifications in the browser or PWA.
notifications.pushOfferedHint: Get instant notifications in the browser or as an installed PWA — even when the app is closed.

descriptions.birthday: When a contact has a birthday today
descriptions.memory: Posts from the same date in previous years
descriptions.familyPost: When a family member or guest posts
descriptions.familyComment: When someone comments on a post

common.noInfo: No info added yet. Click edit to add details.

integrations.momentgardenDesc: Import photos, videos and captions from a MomentGarden ZIP export. Each moment becomes a post on the selected contact's timeline.
integrations.zipHint: Upload one ZIP at a time. Each ZIP contains a captions.txt and media files.
integrations.noCaptions: No captions.txt found in this ZIP file.
integrations.unsupported: files not supported or not found in ZIP
integrations.nothingNew: Nothing new to import — everything is already imported.
integrations.momentgardenCardDesc: Import photos, videos and captions from MomentGarden.
integrations.step1: Log in to momentgarden.com and upgrade to Moment Garden Star (paid subscription).
integrations.step2: Go to settings and select Export (see FAQ). You will receive an email with download links to ZIP files.
integrations.step3: Select the contact to import to below, and upload one ZIP file at a time.
integrations.step4: Optional: sync loves and comments from MomentGarden by pasting your session cookie (see step 3 below).
integrations.syncDesc: Fetch loves and comments from MomentGarden for already imported posts. Requires a session cookie from momentgarden.com (copy from browser DevTools → Application → Cookies).
integrations.cookieHint: Open momentgarden.com → F12 → Application → Cookies → copy the value from CakeCookie[Auth][User]
integrations.syncContactHint: Same contact as used for ZIP import above.
integrations.noMoments: No MomentGarden posts found to sync. Import ZIP files first.
integrations.userMappingDesc: MomentGarden users found in loves and comments. Map them to contacts to identify who said what.
integrations.cleanupDesc: Remove old loves and comments that were imported before user mapping was available (no contact_id). Run this before re-syncing to avoid duplicates.
integrations.cleanupConfirm: This will delete all loves and comments without a mapped contact. Are you sure?
integrations.cleanupDone: Deleted {reactions} loves and {comments} comments without contact mapping.

consistency.title: Relationship consistency
consistency.desc: Find relationships that may have incorrect direction or age mismatches.
consistency.cardDesc: Check for impossible or suspicious relationships.
consistency.noIssues: No issues found. All relationships look consistent.

trash.title: Trash
trash.desc: Restore or permanently delete contacts and posts.
trash.permanentConfirm: This cannot be undone. All associated data and files will be permanently deleted.
trash.emptyAllConfirm: Permanently delete all items in trash? This cannot be undone.

export.title: Export data
export.desc: Download a backup of all your data.
export.dataOnlyDesc: Contacts, relationships, posts, and all metadata. No media files.
export.fullBackupDesc: Everything including photos, videos, and documents.
export.encryptionDisabled: Exports are not encrypted. Set a password to enable.
export.encryptedNote: This file is encrypted. Use the import function or decryption tool to open it.

duplicates.title: Duplicate contacts
duplicates.desc: Find contacts that may be duplicates and merge them.
duplicates.keepFirst: Keep first, merge second into it
duplicates.keepSecond: Keep second, merge first into it
duplicates.mergeConfirm: Merge these contacts? Posts, relationships, photos, and all data from the removed contact will be moved to the kept one.

portal.title: Family portal
portal.desc: Share timelines with extended family. Grandparents, aunts, and others can see photos and interact — without full app access.
portal.notificationsEnabledHint: The guest will receive email updates about new posts and comments. Turn on when they are ready.
portal.notificationsIntro: Choose what to receive by email. We send at most one summary every 6 hours.
portal.notificationsDisabledByAdmin: Notifications have not yet been enabled for you. Ask your family to turn this on.
portal.notificationsNoEmail: We don't have an email address on file for you — ask your family to add one so you can receive updates.
portal.loginOptional: Login is optional. Without email/password, use a share link instead.
portal.deleteGuestConfirm: Delete {name}? They will lose all portal access.
portal.enableForTenantHint: Allow portal guests to view shared timelines for this household.
portal.linkCreated: Link created! Copy and share it:
portal.linkInvalid: This link is invalid or has expired
portal.logoutHint: You can log back in with your link or password.
portal.installIOS: Tap the share button and choose "Add to Home Screen" for easy access.
portal.installAndroid: Add this page to your home screen for easy access.

gifts.title: Gifts
gifts.deleteEventConfirm: Delete this event and unlink all its gifts?
gifts.errorRecipientRequired: Please select at least one recipient
gifts.errorGiverRequired: Please select at least one giver
gifts.deleteProductConfirm: Delete this product? It will be unlinked from any gifts using it.
gifts.pasteUrl: Paste a URL to auto-fill product info
gifts.planningDesc: All gift ideas and reserved gifts. Assign to an event when ready to buy.
gifts.linkContactFirst: Link this member to a contact first (in tenant admin)
gifts.noHistory: This product hasn't been used in any gifts yet
gifts.dropImage: Drop image here or click to upload
gifts.noProductInfo: No details yet — edit this product to add info
gifts.fetchMetadata: Fetch product info from this URL
gifts.scrapeSelectHint: Select what you want to apply to this product:
gifts.scrapeNoData: No product info could be found on this page.
gifts.scrapeBlocked: This site blocked automatic fetching (bot protection). Try a different store link, or add product info manually.

signage.settingsCardDesc: Display posts and photos on a TV / digital signage
signage.confirmDelete: Delete this screen? The URL will stop working immediately.
signage.noScreens: No screens yet. Click "New screen" to create one.
signage.urlHint: Copy this URL and open it on your TV. The token is the secret — only share it with people who should see the display.
signage.regenTokenConfirm: Generate a new URL? The old one will stop working — you'll need to update the TV.

book.settingsCardDesc: Create a printable photo book from timeline posts
book.wizardIntro: Create a photo book from timeline posts. You can preview it, flip through pages, and save as PDF from your browser.
book.fieldTitleHint: Shown on the cover. Defaults to the contact's name.
book.fieldContactsHint: Add one or more contacts. Multiple contacts make a family book.
book.fieldPageSizeHint: Pick a format that matches your print service. Bokfabrikken (Norway) is significantly cheaper than Blurb for Norwegian customers.
book.confirmDelete: Delete this book? This cannot be undone.
book.emptyState: No posts match the selected contact, date range, and visibility.
book.listEmpty: No books yet. Click "New book" to create your first one.
book.curateHint: Click an image to set focal point. Use grid view to exclude pages.
book.weightDesc_full: Own page — layout picked from content (editable per page)
book.weightDesc_small: Shares a page with nearby small posts to save space
book.sharedPageHint: This post shares a page with other small posts
book.regenerateAvailable: New posts available — click to regenerate
book.regenerateConfirm: Regenerate the book? {added} new posts will be added, {removed} removed. Your overrides on kept posts are preserved.
book.regenerateNoChanges: No changes in the date range. Regenerate anyway?
book.customTextHint: Overrides the post body in the book. Leave empty to use the original text.
book.customTextPlaceholder: Add custom text for this page...
book.pageEditHint: Click the image in the preview to set the focal point.
book.batchPageSubtitle: Several small posts combined to save space
book.batchEditHint: Click an image to set its focal point. Use the chat icon to edit a post's caption. Use the fullscreen icon to give a post its own page.
book.coverEditHint: Changes save automatically. The selected theme applies to the whole book.

mg.authorsDesc: Change who is registered as author on imported MomentGarden posts. Select a person in the quick-select, then click "Assign" on the posts.
mg.authorsLinkDesc: Correct who originally posted imported photos
mg.assignAllConfirm: Set {name} as author on all {count} imported posts?
